title: Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Sandalwood & Jasmine, Pack of 12 (12 x 300ml)
features: Enjoy a luxurious day with the soothing notes of citrus vanilla and sandalwood
Settle down in a cashmere sweater with bergamot highlights, and a touch of jasmine
Instantly infuse the air with passionately crafted fragrance to express your spirit
Air freshener for home designed to fight tough odours
Use on a daily basis or as a final touch after your cleaning routine; your home will have a fruity, floral and woody scent
description: Product Description Enjoy a luxurious day with Glade Sensual Sandalwood Jasmine room freshener spray. Imagine the soothing softness of a luxurious cashmere sweater, as notes of fresh citrus with bergamot highlights, floral jasmine and sandalwood surround you in comfort. Designed to fight tough odours, while leaving behind a soothing fragrance, Glade air fresheners can be used on a daily basis or as the final touch after your cleaning routine. This fragrance spray instantly infuses the air with passionately crafted fragrances. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics.
